mapper.sql: SEQ, CPNY_ID, CODE_NO, CODE_NAME, CODE_ENG_NAME, REMARK, START_DATE, END_DATE, COUNTRY, ADDRESS, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP, BUSINESS_SCOPE, PROFIT_CENTER, CODE_KOREAN_NAME, CODE_VIETNAMESE_NAME
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ORG_COST_CENTER
AND UPPER(CODE_NO) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{codeNo}) || '%'
AND (UPPER(CODE_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{codeName}) || '%' OR UPPER(CODE_ENG_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{codeName}) || '%')
ORDER BY ORDERNO, CODE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORG_COST_CENTER ( SEQ, CPNY_ID, CODE_NO, CODE_NAME, CODE_ENG_NAME, REMARK, START_DATE, END_DATE, COUNTRY, ADDRESS, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, UPDATED_IP, BUSINESS_SCOPE, PROFIT_CENTER, CODE_KOREAN_NAME, CODE_VIETNAMESE_NAME ) VALUES ( ORG_COST_CENTER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{cpnyId}, #{codeNo}, #{codeName}, #{codeEngName}, #{remark}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{country}, #{address}, #{activity}, #{orderNo}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{createdIp}, SYSDATE, #{adminID}, #{updatedIp}, #{businessScope}, #{profitCenter}, #{codeKoreanName}, #{codeVietnameseName} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ORG_COST_CENTER SET CODE_NO = #{codeNo}, CODE_NAME = #{codeName}, CODE_ENG_NAME = #{codeEngName}, REMARK = #{remark}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, COUNTRY = #{country}, ADDRESS = #{address}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, UPDATED_IP = #{updatedIp}, BUSINESS_SCOPE = #{businessScope}, PROFIT_CENTER = #{profitCenter}, CODE_KOREAN_NAME = #{codeKoreanName}, CODE_VIETNAMESE_NAME = #{codeVietnameseName} WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.delete: UPDATE ORG_COST_CENTER SET ACTIVITY = '0' WHERE SEQ = #{seq}
